reviews.title: Many hidden fees
reviews.text: They never informed you of the $20 overnight parking fee and $250 for a lost ticket. It’s just ridiculous. My room had a cloth shower curtain that looked like somebody had wiped their ass on it, I tried to tell the maid only to find out she did not speak English, informed the front desk of this on my first day only to return that night to find nothing has been done. They did not even come in and give us fresh towels for our second day. Also their breakfast buffet, which I have gotten at much less hotels for free was charged for $16. They had fruit, eggs, bacon, sausage,  Toast, rolls, waffles, cereal, and yogurt like I said at other hotels this has been complementary here $16. Originally I booked one night only to find out I would have to cancel and book a second night. I just made a second day reservation when I tried to discuss this with the front desk they would not let me finish and explain what the issue was before jumping in and trying to find out what the problem was, a little patience and listening on the front of the  front desk would be appreciated

reviews.title: We had to leave because you guys double booked . Experience there was terrible . Couldve made you guy extremely rich . F
reviews.positives: I liked how they double booked our room
reviews.negatives: How they they double booked our room

reviews.title: Unsure About Booking Again
reviews.text: I’ve stayed here previously and it’s been kind of a hit and miss each time.  This room was horrible.  It was filled with carpet stains, hair in bathtub and on floor, one Kleenex left in the box, only two towels, chipping base caulking everywhere, and itchy sheets.  The staff members at the front desk were nice and the hotel was really easy to find.  I overheard airport shuttle patrons complaining about having to wait 40 -some minutes for the shuttle when it’s only 5 minute drive.   I just don’t know about booking it again for that amount and coming into a room that looked like a crime scene.  How on earth could housekeeping not see it.

reviews.title: Our stay here was the furthest thing from pleasurable
reviews.positives: Didn't get to have breakfast. And it was very crowded. Not much I did enjoy about this hotel
reviews.negatives:
Location parking staff and rooms
Terrible confusing parking operation

reviews.title: Was Ok
reviews.text: Didn't expect to pay $15 a night for parking and $16 for a breakfast buffet

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Molded food in refrigerator 
Tub not clean
Floors in bathroom dirty

reviews.title: Housekeeping needs to do better
reviews.text: It was a great night's stay. Just small issue with the bed not being clean. My wife and I are both blondes and I unwrapped a new piece of equipment and set it on the bed. I picked it up and it had about a dozen long black hairs stuck to it. Leading me to believe that housekeeping doesn't do a very good job.

reviews.title: Wasn’t good enough for me to stay again
reviews.negatives: I don’t like how much I paid for it and how literally everything is an up charge. Had to pay for everything, even with my rewards membership. This wasn’t a great experience, especially with children.

reviews.title: Fine hotel in St. Louis
reviews.text: Decent hotel with great staff, lobby and rooms.  Only one night so could not really explore their facilities, but was certainly one of my better stays on my recent trip.

reviews.title: This reviews are recently
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like the hotel it self you have to pay for the WiFi and than when you get on the internet it still makes you pay also you have to pay for the breakfast it’s not included the price I had paid for the hotel isn’t worth it the pool wasn’t clean at all and their beds was so uncomfortable that me and my family couldn’t sleep. The air conditioning is loud also they need to fix it the bathroom is old they need to update it I see a lil mode in there the covers had hair on it and we just got in it . Overall the experience was to me is not good I will not be coming back to this hotel

reviews.title: Mini Getaway
reviews.text: I found my stay very relaxing and rejuvenated.  The staff was very friendly and quiet when entering my room. My only complaint is the tub has something inside of it that doesn't come out
reviews.room_type: Queen Room with Two Queen Beds and Adapted Tub - Mobility Accessible

reviews.title: To sum it up I will never stay here again
reviews.negatives: They have people staying there and it was just random people walking around

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text:
Pros:
- clean/updated
- friendly staff
- driving distance to tourist attractions 
- no noise from airport noted at night

Cons:
- facilities obviously still closed due to covid

* wasn't able to inquire if in-house restaurant or room service was available or temporarily closed due to pandemic

reviews.title: Unfortunately very unsatisfactory
reviews.positives: It was convenient to my event
reviews.negatives: This staff is not helpful and the room had been clean properly before

reviews.title: Would not stay again
reviews.positives: The staff at the front desk was nice and the lobby was pretty.
reviews.negatives: The bed wasn’t made when we got to our room, and the bed was very uncomfortable as it probably needs replaced!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Very bad work vehicle was broken into, windows busted things taken

reviews.title: Very hot in the room, A/C was broken and bedding not clean. Very disappointed in the renaissance!
reviews.positives: I liked the lobby area and bar only
reviews.negatives: When we actually went up to out floor, the 6th floor to be exact, the walls outside the rooms were opening up, very unappealing for the price I paid. The first room they gave us was the wrong room. I booked a king they tried giving up a double queen room. The tub was disgusting! Asked for the right room and they gave us a king but it looked like no one cleaned the shower. It had a weird smell in the room. It was supposed to be a get away for our anniversary and overall it wasn’t worth $160 for a night.

reviews.title: HORRIBLE
reviews.positives: I DID NOT STAY HERE!!! IT WAS DIRTY!!! I’M WAITING ON MY REFUND!!
reviews.negatives: IT WAS DIRTY. I’M NOT KEEPING MY FAMILY HERE!!

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.negatives: My window being smashed out by vandals. This isn't the first time either, they just failed to notify there customers. I would remove this hotel from your list until they get security figured out

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: It was dirty, a whole bunch of nasty people, the workers were no help

reviews.title: Would not recommend this hotel to anyone
reviews.positives: The location was ok. I was not happy with the fact not only did the take out for incidentals which is understandable but took out another 100.00 for who knows what. When calling to ask why I was told it was my financial institution. That is a lie. I will not stay in this hotel again and would not recommend anyone stay there. The hallways were very noisy and after complaining nothing was done.

reviews.title: Dirty Rooms & Terrible “customer service”
reviews.negatives: After getting to our destination at 3am, we were treated terribly by older guy - employee Joseph at check in. He accused us of not having a real reservation and told us I needed to pay AGAIN! He stated that since I booked through booking.com, I needed to pay the property again. His words were “you paid them, not us” I wish I could post the video of how we were treated. I asked if I could forward the confirmation email and receipt I received from booking.com and stated that my email wouldn’t work and I needed to call them to have booking.com email the hotel. Can you imagine being on the roads for over 10 hours and all you want to do is sleep?!? After finally being able to check in, the room and bathroom were disgusting and the bathroom made a loud knocking noise all night. There should never be chunks of dirt and lent coming from vents. Toilets should never have urine at the base of the toilet. I couldn’t wait to leave. We were so uncomfortable. The customer service was terrible and this place is FAR from a 4 star hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Money was taken out of my account that should not have been. And cause me to be late on my my bills and was hit with late fees on my bills. And there was no compensation. I would not ever stay here again and have pass word around on how I was treated.

reviews.title: Do not stay at the Renaissance St. Louis Airport Hotel. I should have stayed at a Holiday Inn.
reviews.negatives: The extra charges to my bank account that is unaccounted for. It stunk in the room and there was fecal matter all over the toilet and looked as if there were other bodily fluids in the shower.
